author: dunkin-novice
goal: Rebuild profile.html (and th/profile.html) to match the design doc's ScreenProfile while keeping every existing functional surface intact. New top eyebrow + streak hero with gradient italic number + progress panel with rose-gold bar/pearl + horizontal-scroll deck strip + dark-plum lifetime stats (Cards drawn / Questions asked / Readings shared). Existing identity / achievements / history / sign-in CTA panels kept and restyled to feel consistent.
done:
js/profile.js renderStreak: rewritten to emit three siblings into the existing #profile-streak slot instead of one summary panel. (a) .profile-top-row with bilingual eyebrow ('Your practice · บันทึกการเดินทาง'). (b) .profile-streak-hero: gold-uppercase eyebrow ('CURRENT STREAK / สตรีคปัจจุบัน'), large 124px gradient italic number (background-clip: text with linear-gradient 135deg #7a1f56 → #e8457a → #e8a838), bilingual Thai number-word via new thaiNumberWord helper (handles 0-29 with proper 'เอ็ด' for 21, falls back to numeric for >=30), and subtitle 'days in a row · longest yet' when streak_current >= streak_best, else 'best {n}' fallback. (c) .profile-progress-panel: white-surface card with --mt-soft-shadow. Head row: 'Next: {deckName}' (italic-serif) + small bilingual sub-line + right column with italic-gold {remaining} number + 'days to go'. .profile-progress-bar: 12px rose-gold .profile-progress-bar__fill (uses --mt-streak-bar token) with a glowing white-→-gold .profile-progress-bar__pearl absolute-positioned at the fill edge, transition: width 600ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1) for milestone animations. .profile-progress-bar__labels show 'Day {current}' ←→ 'Day {target} · unlock'. Optional .profile-progress-panel__blurb tinted info box renders only when the target deck has blurb_en / blurb_th fields (forward-compatible, no-op for current 12-deck dataset). js/profile.js new renderLifetimeStats: reads state.history to compute cardsDrawn (sum of reading_cards.length across all entries), questionsAsked (count where mode === 'question'), and sharesTotal (reads localStorage._mt_shares_total, defaults to 0 — counter to be wired into share-payload.js in a follow-up). Emits a dark-plum 3-column .profile-lifetime-stats panel into the new #profile-lifetime-stats slot with gold-pale italic numbers and bilingual labels. js/profile.js renderAll: calls renderLifetimeStats between renderDeckInventory and renderAchievementsPanel so DOM order matches design (deck strip → lifetime stats → achievements). profile.html + th/profile.html: add
between deck-inventory and achievements; add after profile-theme.css. css/profile.css NEW (393 lines, 9 sections, --mt-* tokens throughout): §1 page background + shell layout (max-width 440px, --mt-bg-gradient-daily-after page bg, .reading-intro visually-hidden); §2 top eyebrow row; §3 streak hero with gradient text via -webkit-background-clip; §4 progress panel with rose-gold bar + pearl + tinted blurb; §5 deck strip override — uses attribute selector [style*='grid-template-columns'] to override deck-inventory.js's inline 2-col grid into a horizontal-scroll row of 88×124 thumbnails WITHOUT touching deck-inventory.js (mirror-safe — keeps deck-inventory.js as a black box); §6 dark-plum lifetime-stats 3-col; §7 existing panel restyle (identity / achievements / history / cta) — white --mt-surface with --mt-soft-shadow + --mt-radius-panel + gold-pale italic accents; §8 history list items (.profile-history-item__title serif + __cards muted + __actions ghost pills); §9 empty-state copy (signed-out hint and no-readings-yet variants).
verified: md5 canonical == www == ios for js/profile.js (renderStreak rewrite + renderLifetimeStats + thaiNumberWord) and css/profile.css (new file) and profile.html + th/profile.html (CSS link + new slot only)
git diff --stat HEAD~1 HEAD: 4 files changed, 736 insertions, 55 deletions — confined to profile surfaces; no impact on reading.js / main.js / common.js
cp + cap sync ios completed; no plugin errors

thaiNumberWord('14') returns 'สิบสี่วัน' (matches the design doc's สิบสี่วัน label literally); thaiNumberWord('21') returns 'ยี่สิบเอ็ดวัน' (proper Thai grammar — fixed from initial 'ยี่สิบหนึ่งวัน' draft via amend)
notes: PER USER DECISION (AskUserQuestion + follow-up clarification): kept deck-inventory as a section inside profile.html (deferred standalone ScreenDeckInventory page) AND kept all four existing functional panels (identity / achievements / history / cta) below the design's 5 sections. Lifetime stats implemented now rather than stubbed. The deck-strip override is intentionally CSS-only via [style*='grid-template-columns'] attribute selector — deck-inventory.js continues to emit a 2-col grid, and CSS turns it into a horizontal-scroll row at the profile page. This keeps deck-inventory.js usable as-is elsewhere if a future standalone ScreenDeckInventory page needs the 2-col grid. The Phase 4 profile-theme.css is NOT removed — profile.css loads after it and overrides on equal specificity. The shares-total counter is read-only here (defaults to 0); a follow-up should increment localStorage._mt_shares_total from js/share-payload.js after a successful share, OR derive shares from a Supabase counter if signed-in. The design doc ScreenDeckInventory standalone page (line 2002 of MeowTarot_Redesign_final.html) and the still-Phase-4 full.html selection board are NOT in scope here — flagged separately. Full.html selection board lacks any design-doc spec (no ScreenFullBoard / Celtic Cross selection screen in the design); per the halt-and-flag pattern this was surfaced to the user before defaulting to Profile.
filed: Standalone ScreenDeckInventory page (decks.html) not yet built — design spec exists at line 2002 of MeowTarot_Redesign_final.html. Would replace the current horizontal-scroll teaser in profile with a full 2-col grid of all 11 decks. Wire into bottom-nav 'Cards' tab. Deferred from this round per user direction.

full.html selection board still Phase 4 (orbit-style 5×2 deal grid → arrange list) — no design-doc spec exists for it. Three rebuild options surfaced to the user (Daily/Ask 12-grid adaptation, restyle existing 2-stage flow with --mt-* tokens, or hold for design update). User picked defer; needs explicit pick before a future rebuild.

Readings shared counter currently always renders 0 unless localStorage._mt_shares_total is incremented externally. Needs a small follow-up patch in js/share-payload.js: on successful share completion, read+increment+write the counter. Single-line change but explicitly out of scope here to keep this commit profile-only.

Thai number-word helper currently handles 0-29 cleanly (with the เอ็ด vs หนึ่ง distinction); 30+ falls back to numeric '{n} วัน'. If a user hits a 30+ day streak the number renders fine in the gradient hero but the Thai sub-line loses the spelled-out form. Extend the helper when a real user crosses 30 days.

Phase 4 css/profile-theme.css is now partly dead — many of its rules are overridden by css/profile.css. A future cleanup could move the still-active rules into profile.css and delete profile-theme.css. Not blocking; left to keep this commit minimal-diff.

Lifetime-stats panel renders 0/0/0 for not-signed-in users (state.history is empty). The design implies these are 'lifetime' numbers — local-only counters could supplement once we wire daily-read counter to localStorage. Decision deferred.
affects: meowtarot.com/profile.html + meowtarot.com/th/profile.html — profile page now renders the Phase 5 ceremonial layout: top eyebrow strip ('Your practice · บันทึกการเดินทาง'), centered streak hero with huge rose-→-gold gradient italic number + Thai number-word + 'days in a row · longest yet' subtitle, white progress panel showing 'Next: {deck}' + remaining days + rose-gold progress bar with glowing pearl + Day-N/Day-target labels + optional Moonveil-style tinted info box, horizontal-scroll deck thumbnail strip, dark-plum 3-col lifetime-stats panel (Cards drawn / Questions asked / Readings shared), and the existing identity / achievements / history / sign-in CTA panels restyled below to match the new --mt-* surface treatment. The shape and information surface area increase materially — replaces the prior Phase 4 single 'Journey summary' panel and 2-col deck grid.
